title: The eva talent show
wikitext:
[]: The eva talent show.             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Jan 18, 2006 1:57 pm Well i thought id try my hand at starting a topic.Its simple if the eva charactors where all in a talent show what do you think there act would be?If this topic sucks then lock it i dont care. Shinji-I think he would try some speed cooking,iron chef style.Like six meals in 30 minutes os somthing like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Jan 18, 2006 3:54 pm Gendo and Kaji as a Blues Brothers tribute act.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:07 pm Space Penis wrote: Gendo and Kaji as a Blues Brothers tribute act.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:09 pm Rei in a staring contest.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:22 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Rei in a staring contest.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:38 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Rei in a staring contest.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:54 pm Toji and Kensuke would bust some mad freestyles, yo.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Jan 18, 2006 5:02 pm nah ken would totally show of his camara and editing skills with a short film entitled"the ritual of female bathing"and his voice over would be like a discovery channale documentary.for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jan 18, 2006 5:14 pm Ritsuko would probably put the audience to sleep with a really dull lecture entitled "The Rubber Physics of Angel Combat". Kaworu would probably sing "I'm Every Women" or maybe "Girls Just Want to Have Fun", only to elicit a few embarresed coughs from the audience. Aoba would definetly whip out his badassed guitar and rock. The four dudes from the commitee could be the barbershop quartet from hell. Rei could demonstrate her ability to hover and regenerate, and since Keel's a cyborg he could do something involving super-human strength. Misato and Pen-Pen could do stupid pet tricks.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jan 19, 2006 2:04 pm - Shinji and Asuka could play a little scene, where guess-what happens... ... Asuka has a dramatic arguement with good ol' Baka Shinji... Waited for something else? - Kaoru plays on violin and Shinji does the same on cello, while Ayanami and Asuka sing a duett. That'd be impressive I guess. I'd love to hear that. Gainax could make a clip like this, nope? It'd be a great, 'cuz songs are nice! - Dancing EVAs. (like when EVA 01 and EVA 02 killed Israfael). With proper costume, of course. - Sachiel: Bullet Time. Sachiel dodges the bullets of EVA 01. (NGE-Matrix crossover 8) ) - All characters in a short soap opera... don't worry, just kidding... - Kaji, Fuyutsuki and Gendo in a bar, drinking beer and having a discussion about the most beautiful thing they ever saw. I wonder what would they say...

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Thu Jan 19, 2006 2:59 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: - Shinji and Asuka could play a little scene, where guess-what happens... ... Asuka has a dramatic arguement with good ol' Baka Shinji... Waited for something else? - Kaoru plays on violin and Shinji does the same on cello, while Ayanami and Asuka sing a duett. That'd be impressive I guess. I'd love to hear that. Gainax could make a clip like this, nope? It'd be a great, 'cuz songs are nice! - Dancing EVAs. (like when EVA 01 and EVA 02 killed Israfael). With proper costume, of course. - Sachiel: Bullet Time. Sachiel dodges the bullets of EVA 01. (NGE-Matrix crossover 8) ) - All characters in a short soap opera... don't worry, just kidding... - Kaji, Fuyutsuki and Gendo in a bar, drinking beer and having a discussion about the most beautiful thing they ever saw. I wonder what would they say...

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:06 pm Or maybe she could tell how to cook a penguin properly... Pooooooooooor pen-pen.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:25 pm lol that reminds me of the eva4 dating sim lol

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jan 19, 2006 5:20 pm Keel's a cyborg he could do something involving super-human strength

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jan 19, 2006 5:28 pm Probably more rusty than crusty, or he could just murder Gendo brutally (think KOS-MOS style ala arm through the chest) on stage, for calling him a "bucket of bolts", to be rewarded with thunderous applause. Rei would totally drop some fat rhymes yo'. But she would become popular, eventually rapping her way to the states and becoming BlueJayCrunkMasta. With such hits as..."Bust Some in yo' Caps in Angel Ass", "LCL Beat", "Its Hot in this Plug", and "Tap dat Monolith".

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Jan 19, 2006 5:34 pm But... ...Isn't it just his visor and spiine that's cybernetic? That wouldn't give him super-strength... Rei would totally drop some fat rhymes yo'. But she would become popular, eventually rapping her way to the states and becoming BlueJayCrunkMasta. With such hits as..."Bust Some in yo' Caps in Angel Ass", "LCL Beat", "Its Hot in this Plug", and "Tap dat Monolith".

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jan 19, 2006 5:39 pm Space Penis wrote: But... ...Isn't it just his visor and spiine that's cybernetic? That wouldn't give him super-strength... Rei would totally drop some fat rhymes yo'. But she would become popular, eventually rapping her way to the states and becoming BlueJayCrunkMasta. With such hits as..."Bust Some in yo' Caps in Angel Ass", "LCL Beat", "Its Hot in this Plug", and "Tap dat Monolith".

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Jan 19, 2006 6:00 pm Well, he certainly wouldn't be able to do any super-strength with his arms. ....does he even have any legs? There doesn't look like there'd be any room...

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jan 19, 2006 6:39 pm Well according to the RCB his arms were mechinical- just an internal skeleton that probably fell off to the side, I mean look where his visor went. His legs are probably off camera, as we don't see everything. For more on this http://animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=167003&page=27&pp=15 To get the full gist of my theories on some of his systems you'll need to read at least two or three pages of this thread. At one point in this thread a crack is made by myself about a Keel/Motoko pairing, If you are really brave Dr. Nick does a little story on it in the Go Hikari! thread of the same forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jan 20, 2006 9:34 am Kyle: Do you hate rude people dr4g0nslr?
